title: North And South.
content:
The Jews their beds and offices of ease,
    Placed north and south for these clean purposes;
    That man's uncomely froth might not molest
    God's ways and walks, which lie still east and west.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "North And South."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
